_comment: Persona-spine debt ratchet. Files here were ALREADY using a persona-unaware client transport (authedFetchHeaders / getSupabaseAccessToken) when the gate was introduced on 2026-07-20. They are allowed to pass the gate as tracked debt. As each is migrated to personaFetch (with personaIdHint), DELETE it from this list — the ratchet only tightens, never loosens. NEVER add a new file here to make a violation pass; fix the violation instead. Full inventory incl. the raw-fetch/getSession classes the string-gate can't catch: see the 2026-07-20 persona-spine audit.
